name: TanStack Form (Headless Form State Management)

agent_readiness.notes: TanStack's headless form library for React, Vue, Solid, Angular, Svelte. useForm() with TypeScript generics. field.state.value, field.handleChange. Async validation, cross-field validation. Zod/Yup/Valibot adapters. Fine-grained field-level subscriptions (no full re-render on keypress). Framework-agnostic core. Still reaching v1 stability. More complex API than react-hook-form. Better when you need framework-agnostic forms or fine-grained control.

best_when: Multi-framework teams (React + Vue + Solid) wanting one form library
Complex forms needing field-level subscriptions and async validation
Teams already using TanStack Query/Router wanting ecosystem consistency
TypeScript-heavy projects needing end-to-end type safety
avoid_when: Simple forms (react-hook-form simpler and more established)
summary: TanStack Form is a headless, framework-agnostic form library from the TanStack ecosystem. useForm() with fine-grained field subscriptions, async validation, Zod/Yup/Valibot adapters. Works across React, Vue, Solid, Angular, Svelte. More verbose than react-hook-form but better for complex cross-framework teams. TypeScript-first with end-to-end type safety. Choose react-hook-form for simpler React-only forms.
